creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
Can you try this with sc(4) (and a 80 col wide terminal):
 
$ printf 'xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx x\nxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx\nx\n'

then copy and paste, and report whether it is three or four lines? xterm handles this correctly (as an 81-char line, and then two at 79 and 1).

My suspicion is that sc(4) just strips trailing whitespace, which is not quite correct but preferable.
